title: Single-cell RNA-sequencing of mouse thymic epithelial cells across the first year of life
cell_type_or_sort: FACS-purified TEC populations: mTEClo, mTEChi, cTEC, Dsg3+ TEC; inferred TEC subtypes include mTEC-like states
likely_age_batch_confound: reduced but not eliminated; source states ages and days were block sorted into plate areas to minimize confounding
reason: Best candidate found: independent mouse TEC ageing dataset with mTEClo/mTEChi sort labels, 5 individual mice per age, processed post-QC count matrices and metadata through MouseThymusAgeing, plus ArrayExpress/BioStudies run metadata.
notes: Use as independent mTEC-focused transcript-level test, not exact GSE240016 mTEC1 replication.

title: Charting the age-altered thymic epithelial cell differentiation by lineage tracing from a beta 5-t expressing TEC progenitor
cell_type_or_sort: Hashed TEC lineage-tracing experiment with mTEC and cTEC groups after beta5t-lineage induction
technology: 10x Genomics droplet scRNA-seq with cell hashing
age_groups: induction ages 1, 4, 16 weeks; sampled after induction interval
has_mouse_or_biological_sample_id: partial; SDRF lists mixed pool/source/run replicate and Bioconductor metadata supports multiplexed samples
likely_age_batch_confound: possible; multiplexed design and source/run structure require explicit metadata audit
reason: Usable but less direct than E-MTAB-8560: fewer biological replicates than target and transgenic lineage-tracing design, but processed data and mTEC/cTEC labels are available.
notes: Secondary candidate if E-MTAB-8560 analysis is inconclusive or for sensitivity.

title: Global transcriptional profiling reveals distinct functions of thymic stromal subsets and age-related changes during thymic involution
cell_type_or_sort: FACS-sorted cTEC, mTEClo, mTEChi, dendritic cell subsets, fibroblasts
likely_age_batch_confound: age may be coupled to small replicate/sample structure; n=2 per age/subset
reason: mTEClo/mTEChi labels are useful, but n=2 per age/subset does not improve biological power over the current n=2 vs n=2 concern, and it is microarray rather than RNA-seq.

title: Bulk RNA-seq in young and aged mice across 23 cell-types
cell_type_or_sort: Thymic epithelial and thymic fibroblast sorted bulk populations; no mTEC subtype
likely_age_batch_confound: unclear without run-level audit; broad thymic epithelial rows have biological sample labels
reason: Good biological replication and processed counts, but thymic epithelial samples are broad TEC and cannot test mTEC/mTEC1 specificity.
notes: Broad directional context only; already less specific than target.

title: Age-related epithelial defects limit thymic function and regeneration [single cell]
cell_type_or_sort: CD45-negative thymic stromal scRNA-seq with mTEC1 annotation after analysis
likely_age_batch_confound: batch concern remains from current audit
reason: Current primary dataset, not independent, and retains n=2 vs n=2 mTEC1 limitation.
notes: Reference only; not an external test.

title: Age-related epithelial defects limit thymic function and regeneration [bulk]
cell_type_or_sort: CD45-negative thymic stromal bulk RNA-seq; not mTEC-specific
likely_age_batch_confound: not applicable for young-vs-aged mTEC testing
reason: Same study family, not independent, no aged steady-state comparison, and broad CD45-negative stromal bulk rather than mTEC-specific.
notes: Not suitable for the requested independent ageing test.

title: Single cell sequencing defines a branched progenitor population of stable medullary thymic epithelial cells
cell_type_or_sort: Flow-sorted mTEC single-cell samples, Aire lineage trace and anti-RANKL experiments
has_mouse_or_biological_sample_id: limited; samples may pool multiple thymi
reason: Useful mTEC biology dataset, but it is not an adult ageing dataset with young-vs-aged biological replicate structure.

title: RNA-seq of medullary thymic epithelial cell subsets in inducible Aire-lineage tracing mice
cell_type_or_sort: Sorted mTEC subsets after Aire lineage tracing
reason: mTEC-specific and replicated, but not young-vs-aged.

title: Large-scale single cell mapping of the thymic stroma identifies a new thymic epithelial cell lineage
cell_type_or_sort: Thymic stromal scRNA-seq with TEC/mTEC states
age_groups: adult/reference and perturbation contexts, not ageing
reason: Useful thymic stromal reference, but not designed as a young-vs-aged mouse mTEC dataset.

title: Transcriptome of mimetic thymic epithelial cell populations
cell_type_or_sort: Mimetic TEC subsets from young wild-type mice
reason: TEC-subtype dataset but no young-vs-aged comparison.
